privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real-world 'Bologna Pasubio' SUMO scenario provided by the municipality of Bologna. The environment scripts prepare the scenario at `/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio` and an output directory at `/home/ga/SUMO_Output`. The expected workflow involves generating `incident.rou.xml` with a 15-minute vehicle stop on a chosen lane, then running two simulations to produce `tripinfo_incident.xml` (standard routing) and `tripinfo_rerouted.xml` (dynamic rerouting). The verifier dynamically parses the agent-produced XML files to calculate the true average durations to score the agent's `impact_report.txt`. A standard simulation without an incident yields an average trip duration of approximately 345.38 seconds, though the final averages will depend on the specific lane the agent blocks.
